systemPrompt: You are taking a short test. Read each question carefully and respond exactly as instructed, with no extra commentary, explanation, or formatting.

questions.title: Count letters: "r" in "strawberry"
questions.prompt: How many times does the letter "r" appear in the word "strawberry"? Respond with only a single integer and nothing else.

questions.title: Count letters: "e" in "beekeeper"
questions.prompt: How many times does the letter "e" appear in the word "beekeeper"? Respond with only a single integer and nothing else.

questions.title: Multi-step arithmetic
questions.prompt: Compute (17 × 24) − (348 ÷ 4). Respond with only the resulting integer and nothing else.

questions.title: Cognitive reflection: bat & ball
questions.prompt: A bat and a ball cost $1.10 in total. The bat costs $1.00 more than the ball. How many cents does the ball cost? Respond with only the integer number of cents and nothing else.

questions.title: Cognitive reflection: widgets
questions.prompt: If 5 machines take 5 minutes to make 5 widgets, how many minutes would 100 machines take to make 100 widgets? Respond with only the integer and nothing else.

questions.title: Transitive syllogism
questions.prompt: All bloops are razzies. All razzies are lazzies. Are all bloops definitely lazzies? Answer with only the single word "yes" or "no".

questions.title: Relational ordering
questions.prompt: Tom is taller than Sara. Sara is taller than Mia. Who is the shortest? Respond with only that person's first name and nothing else.

questions.title: Strict format: exactly three lowercase words
questions.prompt: Respond with exactly three words. All words must be lowercase letters only. Separate them with single spaces. Include no punctuation, no numbers, and no other text.

questions.title: Constraint satisfaction: a q…k word
questions.prompt: Give one English word that is exactly five letters long, starts with the letter "q", and ends with the letter "k". Respond with only the word in lowercase and nothing else.
